scenario.name: bye-call-drop
scenario.send: BYE sip:[service] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: <sip:drop-caller-[call_number]@[local_ip]>;tag=[call_number] To: <sip:drop-callee-[call_number]@[service]> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 BYE Contact: <sip:drop-caller-[call_number]@[local_ip]:[local_port]> Max-Forwards: 70 Content-Length: 0
